fields.name: MYSY Scholarship (Mukhyamantri Yuva Swavalamban Yojana)
fields.eligible_courses: B.Sc. Agriculture, Horticulture, Forestry, Community Science, Food Nutrition & Dietetics; B.Tech. Agricultural Engg., Food Tech, Biotechnology, Agri IT, Renewable Energy
fields.eligibility_criteria: Gujarat domicile, 80%+ in 12th (Science stream), family income ≤ ₹6 lakh/year
fields.how_to_apply: Register on mysy.guj.nic.in and fill online form
fields.notes: Major state scholarship for professional UG students

fields.name: MYSY શિષ્યવૃત્તિ (મુખ્યમંત્રી યુવા સ્વાવલંબન યોજના)
fields.eligible_courses: B.Sc. કૃષિ, બાગાયત, વનસ્પતિ, સામુદાયિક વિજ્ઞાન; B.Tech. કૃષિ ઈજનેરી, ફૂડ ટેક
fields.eligibility_criteria: ગુજરાત નિવાસ, ધો.12 માં 80%+, કૌટુંબિક આવક ₹6 લાખ/વર્ષ
fields.notes: વ્યાવસાયિક UG વિદ્યાર્થીઓ માટે મુખ્ય રાજ્ય શિષ્યવૃત્તિ

fields.name: National Scholarship Portal (NSP)
fields.eligible_courses: All UG courses including B.Sc. (Hons.) and B.Tech. (Agri & allied)
fields.eligibility_criteria: Varies by scheme: SC/ST/OBC/EWS/Minority; income limit applies

fields.name: નેશનલ સ્કૉલર્શિપ પૉર્ટલ (NSP)
fields.eligible_courses: B.Sc. અને B.Tech. (કૃષિ & સહ-ક્ષેત્ર) સહિત તમામ UG અભ્યાસક્રમો

fields.name: ICAR National Talent Scholarship (NTS)
fields.eligible_courses: B.Sc. (Hons.) in Agriculture / Horticulture / Forestry (ICAR-AU admitted students only)
fields.eligibility_criteria: Admission through ICAR AIEEA UG, non-domicile of that state

fields.name: ICAR નેશનલ ટૅલેન્ટ સ્કૉલર્શિપ (NTS)
fields.eligible_courses: B.Sc. (Hons.) કૃષિ / બાગાયત / વનસ્પતિ (ફક્ત ICAR-AU પ્રવેશ)
fields.eligibility_criteria: ICAR AIEEA UG દ્વારા પ્રવેશ, ઉક્ત રાજ્યના નિવાસ ન હોય

fields.name: Digital Gujarat Scholarship
fields.eligible_courses: All UG courses (B.Sc. / B.Tech. – Agriculture & allied fields) for SC/ST/OBC/SEBC/EWS

fields.name: ડિજિટલ ગુજરાત શિષ્યવૃત્તિ
fields.eligible_courses: SC/ST/OBC/SEBC/EWS માટે B.Sc. / B.Tech. (કૃષિ & સહ-ક્ષેત્ર)

fields.name: INSPIRE Scholarship (by DST)
fields.eligible_courses: B.Sc. (Hons.) Agriculture, Biotechnology, Pure Science
fields.eligibility_criteria: Top 1% in 12th (Science stream), pursuing UG in science
fields.notes: Central Govt. for top science rankers

fields.name: INSPIRE શિષ્યવૃત્તિ (DST)
fields.eligible_courses: B.Sc. (Hons.) કૃષિ, Biotechnology, Pure Science

fields.name: ONGC Scholarship for SC/ST/EWS
fields.eligible_courses: B.Tech. Agricultural Engg., Food Tech, Biotechnology; B.Sc. Agriculture & allied

fields.name: ONGC SC/ST/EWS શિષ્યવૃત્તિ
fields.eligible_courses: B.Tech. Agricultural Engg., Food Tech; B.Sc. Agriculture

fields.name: Kanya Kelavani Yojana (Girls only)
fields.eligible_courses: All UG courses including Agri & Allied Sciences

fields.name: કન્યા કેળવણી યોજના (ફક્ત છોકરીઓ)
fields.eligible_courses: B.Sc. / B.Tech. (કૃષિ & સહ-ક્ષેત્ર) સહિત તમામ UG

fields.name: Sitaram Jindal Foundation Scholarship
fields.eligible_courses: All UG courses including B.Sc. / B.Tech. (Agri & Allied)

fields.name: સીતારામ જિંદાલ ફાઉન્ડેશન શિષ્યવૃત્તિ
fields.eligible_courses: B.Sc. / B.Tech. (કૃષિ & સહ-ક્ષેત્ર)

fields.name: LIC Golden Jubilee Scholarship
fields.eligible_courses: All UG courses

fields.name: LIC ગોલ્ડન જ્યુબિલી શિષ્યવૃત્તિ
fields.eligible_courses: તમામ UG અભ્યાસક્રમો

fields.name: Minority Scholarships (NSP / NGOs)
fields.eligible_courses: All UG courses including Agriculture
fields.eligibility_criteria: Minority students with 50%+ marks, income ≤ ₹2 lakh
fields.notes: Check with local Minority Welfare Dept.

fields.name: લઘુમતી શિષ્યવૃત્તિ (NSP / NGO)
fields.eligible_courses: B.Sc. / B.Tech. (કૃષિ) સહિત તમામ UG
fields.notes: સ્થાનિક Minority Welfare Dept. સ્ંપર્ક કરો
